title: Boards
subtitle: Your boards at a glance
emptyHint: Add a brick to get started.

addSheet.title: Add Brick
addSheet.description: Choose a brick to add to your board.
addSheet.empty: No brick types available. Install a plugin that provides bricks.

config.title: Configure Brick
config.noOptions: This brick type has no configurable options.

dashboard.newDescription: Create a new board to organize your bricks.
dashboard.editDescription: Customize your board's name and icon.
dashboard.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete this board and remove all its bricks. This action cannot be undone.
dashboard.reorderDescription: Drag to rearrange the order of your boards.
